name: shiguang-notes
description: 拾光笔记 Electron 桌面客户端

scripts.dev: cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ concurrently -k "vite" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/electron/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ playwright test
